TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Gongxidaye(u kamu nu Lipun: Gongxidaye, 1956 a mihcaanÔľć) i Lipun jing gang xian qing shui ding lecuhen u misakulitay a kulit tu cudad a tatama. kaliliman i Lipun mamin micudad tu talawkaway a cacudadan, Gongxidaye mamusakawaw tu sikulitay a misangaay tu kulit,u nu tademaw a kulit a kawaw nida. sisa Gongxidaye malinga tu tu pasayni nu wawaan a kuit misanga, mamin sa 1999 a mihcaan wucu nu buyu i kilakilangan makaadih tu adidiay a kiwma nu kungku "kapah ayda sakapahay a nikalalitemuh" kyu makaala tu tuluway a sakasengan a kawlah nu kulit. 2003 a mihcaan Gongxidaye yadah kuni papeluwan tu konglong a sasakamuwan "u nu konglong a kulit tayamin" , tu nu sayaway "adihen mayda asu'ay"sisa 2010 a mihcaan misumat tu misaungaay a kacudu; u luma a mihcaan tu cacay a bataan a bulad i nakulikulitan i Toykui a tilibi "Gongxidaye pakaluwaluwah adihen mayda asu'ay"(Gongxidaye pakaluwaluwah„Āä„Āĺ„Āą„ĀÜ„Āĺ„ĀĚ„ĀÜ„Ā†„Ā™) a adihan, misanga tu misaungaay a tilibi paadih. 2015 a mihcaan tu waluay a bulad"u sakasaetimen naku a wawa kisu"makaycu tu mala kacudu misaungaay inga. matatulin kina kawaw nida mikulit tu cudad, Gongxidaye misanga tu nu wawa a sapasubana tu sikulitay a cudad,sawni nisulit; atu nu Lipun a sipakungku i tatacuwacuwa. nilacul namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan wikipayke-ŚģģŤ•ŅťĀĒšĻü nasulitan ni Lisin Kubung i 2019 itiza Sakul niyazu'
S.PHON: goŇč*idaj…ô(u kamu nu r~…ĺipun: goŇč*idaj…ô, **** a mińß ¶aan*) i r~…ĺipun jiŇč gaŇč *ian *iŇč sńßui diŇč r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß…ôn u misakur~…ĺitaj a kur~…ĺit tu ¶udad a tatama. kar~…ĺir~…ĺiman i r~…ĺipun mamin mi ¶udad tu tar~…ĺawkawaj a ¶a ¶udadan, goŇč*idaj…ô mamusakawaw tu sikur~…ĺitaj a misaŇčaaj tu kur~…ĺit,u nu tad…ômaw a kur~…ĺit a kawaw nida. sisa goŇč*idaj…ô mar~…ĺiŇča tu tu pasajni nu wawaan a kuit misaŇča, mamin sa **** a mińß ¶aan wu ¶u nu buju i kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan makaadińß tu adidiaj a kiwma nu kuŇčku "kapańß ajda sakapańßaj a nikar~…ĺar~…ĺit…ômuńß" kju makaar~…ĺa tu tur~…ĺuwaj a sakas…ôŇčan a kawr~…ĺańß nu kur~…ĺit. **** a mińß ¶aan goŇč*idaj…ô jadańß kuni pap…ôr~…ĺuwan tu koŇčr~…ĺoŇč a sasakamuwan "u nu koŇčr~…ĺoŇč a kur~…ĺit tajamin" , tu nu sajawaj "adińß…ôn majda asu Ē~ °aj"sisa **** a mińß ¶aan misumat tu misauŇčaaj a ka ¶udu; u r~…ĺuma a mińß ¶aan tu ¶a ¶aj a bataan a bur~…ĺad i nakur~…ĺikur~…ĺitan i tojkui a tir~…ĺibi "goŇč*idaj…ô pakar~…ĺuwar~…ĺuwańß adińß…ôn majda asu Ē~ °aj"(goŇč*idaj…ô pakar~…ĺuwar~…ĺuwańß*********) a adińßan, misaŇča tu misauŇčaaj a tir~…ĺibi paadińß. **** a mińß ¶aan tu war~…ĺuaj a bur~…ĺad"u sakasa…ôtim…ôn naku a wawa kisu"makaj ¶u tu mar~…ĺa ka ¶udu misauŇčaaj iŇča. matatur~…ĺin kina kawaw nida mikur~…ĺit tu ¶udad, goŇč*idaj…ô misaŇča tu nu wawa a sapasubana tu sikur~…ĺitaj a ¶udad,sawni nisur~…ĺit; atu nu r~…ĺipun a sipakuŇčku i tata ¶uwa ¶uwa. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan wikipajk…ô-**** nasur~…ĺitan ni r~…ĺisin kubuŇč i **** itiza sakur~…ĺ nijazu Ē~ °
S.FORM: Gongxidaye(u kamu nu Lipun: Gongxidaye, 1956 a mihcaanÔľć) i Lipun jing gang xian qing shui ding lecuhen u misakulitay a kulit tu cudad a tatama. kaliliman i Lipun mamin micudad tu talawkaway a cacudadan, Gongxidaye mamusakawaw tu sikulitay a misangaay tu kulit,u nu tademaw a kulit a kawaw nida. sisa Gongxidaye malinga tu tu pasayni nu wawaan a kuit misanga, mamin sa 1999 a mihcaan wucu nu buyu i kilakilangan makaadih tu adidiay a kiwma nu kungku "kapah ayda sakapahay a nikalalitemuh" kyu makaala tu tuluway a sakasengan a kawlah nu kulit. 2003 a mihcaan Gongxidaye yadah kuni papeluwan tu konglong a sasakamuwan "u nu konglong a kulit tayamin" , tu nu sayaway "adihen mayda asu'ay"sisa 2010 a mihcaan misumat tu misaungaay a kacudu; u luma a mihcaan tu cacay a bataan a bulad i nakulikulitan i Toykui a tilibi "Gongxidaye pakaluwaluwah adihen mayda asu'ay"(Gongxidaye pakaluwaluwah„Āä„Āĺ„Āą„ĀÜ„Āĺ„ĀĚ„ĀÜ„Ā†„Ā™) a adihan, misanga tu misaungaay a tilibi paadih. 2015 a mihcaan tu waluay a bulad"u sakasaetimen naku a wawa kisu"makaycu tu mala kacudu misaungaay inga. matatulin kina kawaw nida mikulit tu cudad, Gongxidaye misanga tu nu wawa a sapasubana tu sikulitay a cudad,sawni nisulit; atu nu Lipun a sipakungku i tatacuwacuwa. nilacul namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan wikipayke-ŚģģŤ•ŅťĀĒšĻü nasulitan ni Lisin Kubung i 2019 itiza Sakul niyazu'
S.PHON: goŇč*idaj…ô(u kamu nu r~…ĺipun: goŇč*idaj…ô, **** a mińß ¶aan*) i r~…ĺipun jiŇč gaŇč *ian *iŇč sńßui diŇč r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß…ôn u misakur~…ĺitaj a kur~…ĺit tu ¶udad a tatama. kar~…ĺir~…ĺiman i r~…ĺipun mamin mi ¶udad tu tar~…ĺawkawaj a ¶a ¶udadan, goŇč*idaj…ô mamusakawaw tu sikur~…ĺitaj a misaŇčaaj tu kur~…ĺit,u nu tad…ômaw a kur~…ĺit a kawaw nida. sisa goŇč*idaj…ô mar~…ĺiŇča tu tu pasajni nu wawaan a kuit misaŇča, mamin sa **** a mińß ¶aan wu ¶u nu buju i kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan makaadińß tu adidiaj a kiwma nu kuŇčku "kapańß ajda sakapańßaj a nikar~…ĺar~…ĺit…ômuńß" kju makaar~…ĺa tu tur~…ĺuwaj a sakas…ôŇčan a kawr~…ĺańß nu kur~…ĺit. **** a mińß ¶aan goŇč*idaj…ô jadańß kuni pap…ôr~…ĺuwan tu koŇčr~…ĺoŇč a sasakamuwan "u nu koŇčr~…ĺoŇč a kur~…ĺit tajamin" , tu nu sajawaj "adińß…ôn majda asu Ē~ °aj"sisa **** a mińß ¶aan misumat tu misauŇčaaj a ka ¶udu; u r~…ĺuma a mińß ¶aan tu ¶a ¶aj a bataan a bur~…ĺad i nakur~…ĺikur~…ĺitan i tojkui a tir~…ĺibi "goŇč*idaj…ô pakar~…ĺuwar~…ĺuwańß adińß…ôn majda asu Ē~ °aj"(goŇč*idaj…ô pakar~…ĺuwar~…ĺuwańß*********) a adińßan, misaŇča tu misauŇčaaj a tir~…ĺibi paadińß. **** a mińß ¶aan tu war~…ĺuaj a bur~…ĺad"u sakasa…ôtim…ôn naku a wawa kisu"makaj ¶u tu mar~…ĺa ka ¶udu misauŇčaaj iŇča. matatur~…ĺin kina kawaw nida mikur~…ĺit tu ¶udad, goŇč*idaj…ô misaŇča tu nu wawa a sapasubana tu sikur~…ĺitaj a ¶udad,sawni nisur~…ĺit; atu nu r~…ĺipun a sipakuŇčku i tata ¶uwa ¶uwa. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan wikipajk…ô-**** nasur~…ĺitan ni r~…ĺisin kubuŇč i **** itiza sakur~…ĺ nijazu Ē~ °
